case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. WILLIAM MCNAUGHTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCNAUGHTON, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCNAUGHTON, WILLIAM $5,065.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,515.74 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,581.73
